name: Inner Mongolia Baotou Steel Union Co., Ltd.
summary: Inner Mongolia Baotou Steel Union Co., Ltd. operates in the steel industry in China and internationally. It offers automobile, appliance, high-grade pipeline, and high-strength structural steel products. It also provides wide and heavy plates, silicon steel, hot continuous and supporting cold rolling, continuous rolling, galvanizing, etc., as well as seamless pipes, rails, and wires and bars. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Baotou, China. Inner Mongolia Baotou Steel Union Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Baotou Iron and Steel (Group) Co., Ltd.
